dslRule.dsl:
functionDeclaration functiondeclaration_1 where
	and(
		functiondeclaration_1.body contain exceptionBlock exceptionblock_1 where
			exceptionblock_1.catchBlocks contain catchBlock catchblock_1 where
				catchblock_1.parameters contain alias_1 where
					and(
						alias_1 is valueDeclaration,
						alias_1.type.name match ".*NullPointerException"
					),
		not(
			functiondeclaration_1.body contain functionCall functioncall_1 where
				functioncall_1.base.name == "Assertions"
		)
	);
dslRule.description: 规则描述信息，需用户修改
